description: Stop a running task or kill an OS process. Two modes: (1) task_id: stop a task managed by this agent (from execute_command async, run_tasks, call_llm). (2) process_id: kill any OS process by PID (found via netstat, tasklist, Get-Process). If both provided, process_id takes priority. Returns: 'task {task_id} stopped' or 'process {pid} killed'. Example (task): {"task_id": "cmd-1"}. Example (process): {"process_id": 12345}
name: process_task_stop

task_id.description: Task ID to stop (from execute_command async, run_tasks, etc.)

process_id.description: OS process PID to kill (found via netstat, tasklist, Get-Process)
